_comment: Per-environment thresholds for the db-perf-smoke runner. CI fails only when a hot query exceeds a configured limit. Latency limits (mean_ms / max_ms) are required per env. Row-count limits (mean_rows / max_rows) are optional — when omitted, the runner skips row-count checks for that env, preserving prior behavior. Each `queries` entry may override any of these four fields. Select an env with PERF_ENV=<key>; falls back to 'default'. Matching is case-insensitive substring against the normalized SQL text; first match wins.
